rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, VS. JASON GIBSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 8, 2016, 2016, Line 3. PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to September 19, 2016 for moving party to comply with CCP 437c(a)(2) and CCP 1014 and serve the motion on all parties who appeared in this action. Specifically, Proof of Service indicates that only Jason Gibson was served with this motion, not Sara Gibson and Brandon Jackson. Supplemental proof of service to be filed no later than September 14, 2016. =(501/AB)

rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, VS. MATTHEW J. LEWANDOWSKY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To 1) Compel Defendant'S Responses, Without Objection, To Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer , Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; 2) Deem Admissions; And 3) Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 8, 2016, 2016, Line 4. PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION'S Motion To 1) Compel Defendant'S Responses, Without Objection, To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; 2) Deem Admissions; And 3) Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant. GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production to Plaintiff within 5 days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions grated in the amount if $770 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/AB)
